ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Mar-08-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mr. Huysentruyt for petitioner Charles Jackson.

Mr. Huysentruyt advised the Court that the Petition for Final Distribution was filed yesterday. The Court asked for an explanation of his failure to appear in February pursuant to the order to appear. He apologized to the Court, and said that his client had been away on an extended trip, and when he had returned had been injured in a fall. He said that in dealing with his client's absence and injury, he had inadvertantly missed the February hearing. The Court expressed distress over the number of cases in which counsel and parties fail to attend court hearings or contact the court by telephone. Mr. Huysentruyt again apologized for not having done so. The Court ordered the Status Hearing, Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Feb-22-2017 Continued To Mar-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances by any party, counsel or any interested party.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Charles L. Jackson to appear on March 08, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the final inventory and appraisal and report of status of administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

An Order to Show cause will be issued to the Attorney Kurt D. Huysentruyt to appear on March 08, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the final inventory and appraisal and report of status of administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera and Nancy Wong. Court Investigator: Sandra Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Jan-30-2017 Continued To Feb-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on February 22, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution have not been filed. Status on close of the Estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch/John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Duong. Not reported.

Petition For Preliminary Distribution And For Partial Allowance Of Executor Commission And Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Mar-01-2016 Continued To Mar-15-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Vangalen Brown (daughter of decedent) in Propria Persona. Scott Brown (grandson) in Propria Persona. Kyler Chastain (grandson) also present.

This matter was pre-granted however the parties listed above came in to find out what was happening.

The Court stated that this is a petition to open probate, that no objections have been filed and asked if the parties present were here to object. Ms. Brown stated that she is not objecting, that she has never seen the will and does not know the people that are handling the estate. The Court stated that it cannot give legal advice, explained that this was to appoint an executor who will administer and distribute the estate as stated in the will and stated that if there is an objection the matter will be continued and if there is no objection the matter will be granted. Mr. Brown stated that his grandfather worked with Mr. Jackson and that he trusts him to do what needs to be done. The Court suggested consulting with an attorney to be fully advised as to what the procedures are.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. . Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
